name: Spoiler
description: Hide long sections of content under a spoiler
searchText: spoiler hide long sections of content under a spoiler @mantine/core /core/spoiler controlref defaultexpanded expanded hidearialabel hidelabel maxheight onexpandedchange showarialabel showlabel transitionduration

props.name: controlRef
props.description: Ref of the toggle button element

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Initial expanded state in uncontrolled mode. If true, content starts expanded. If false, content starts collapsed

props.name: hideAriaLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the toggle button when expanded. If not set, hideLabel is used

props.name: hideLabel
props.description: Content displayed in the toggle button when content is expanded (to collapse)

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum height of visible content in px. When content exceeds this height, the toggle control appears

props.name: onExpandedChange
props.description: Called when expanded state changes (when spoiler visibility is toggled by the user)

props.name: showAriaLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the toggle button when collapsed. If not set, showLabel is used

props.name: showLabel
props.description: Content displayed in the toggle button when content is collapsed (to expand)

props.name: transitionDuration
props.description: Spoiler reveal transition duration in ms. Set to 0 to disable animation
